keyFindings.description: New-issue titles missing in /state/materialized response — titles map only includes tracked issues, but new issues are not yet tracked. Poll NEW section will always show blank titles even though issueTitleCache has the data. Fix: populate titles for newIssues entries from issueTitleCache after draining accumulator.
newIssuesSinceLastPoll has no deduplication — same issue can appear multiple times if it cycles on/off board between polls.
Internal worker task artifacts (.legion/tasks/bg_*.json) included in PR diff — noise, not part of deliverable.
